item.title: High‑value tech and integrated circuit design at centre of Mosti’s plan to raise Malaysia’s economic complexity, says deputy minister
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — The Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation (MOSTI) through MIMOS Bhd is focusing o...
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), startup(+2), funding(+2)

item.title: Bersatu withdraws suit against speaker over 5 MPs’ seats
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bersatu's lawyer says the decision was prompted by the Federal Court's recent dismissal of a similar case involving four Sabahan MPs.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Election court strikes out petition against BN’s Kunak victory
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The petition was filed by a voter who questioned the election’s validity, claiming several duplicate ballots were discovered during the counting process.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), election(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Zizie Izette tells court she was ‘shocked’, but accepted RM2.8m ‘introductory fee’ for setting up agents with late husband Bung Moktar
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Ex-SRC director Ismee denies knowledge of RM42mil transfer to Najib
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ismee Ismail says he discovered the transactions only after being called by the authorities.
Matched: ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Cops record statement in alleged plot to topple govt
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Top cop Khalid Ismail says one person has come forward voluntarily, with another 'three to four' expected to be called in to assist with the investigation.
Matched: ministry(+2), corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Topple govt probe: IGP says three to four more individuals to be called in

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Puteri Wangsa seat belongs to the people, says Amira
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Puteri Wangsa assemblyman says that any party has the right to contest in a democratic system, but the final decision rests with the people.
Matched: parliament(+2), corruption(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Guan Eng wins defamation suit against Zuraida
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
High Court awards RM50,000 in damages to the ex-finance minister over allegations made by his former Cabinet colleague.
Matched: parliament(+2), court(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: PN must stay ‘open’ and show political maturity, says PAS leader
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Iskandar Abdul Samad says leaders must demonstrate magnanimity by putting aside past disputes and conflicts for the nation’s future.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Four men plead not guilty to machete attack that left man injured at Penang mall
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
GEORGE TOWN, March 5 — Four men pleaded not guilty in the Sessions Court here today to a charge of conspiring to c...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: 4 men in Penang claim trial to seriously injuring man with parang
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The victim lost his right arm in the assault on Feb 25.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hindu endowments better managed by states due to land link, says unity ministry
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ministry says such endowments are closely linked to land used for temples, which falls under state jurisdiction.
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Samsuri rules out Muhyiddin as PN’s choice for PM after Bersatu chief casts doubt on his candidacy

Matched: policy(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: RM2.8mil was fee for introducing Bung to deal, says widow
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Zizie Izette Abdul Samad denies the money was corrupt payment collected on behalf of Felcra Bhd’s then non-executive chairman, Bung Moktar Radin.
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Bank Negara maintains OPR at 2.75%
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The central bank says the current OPR level remains appropriate and supportive of the economy amid price stability.
Matched: policy(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Referral of AG-PP bill to special committee not unprecedented, says BHEUU
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Legal affairs division of the prime minister's department says similar referrals were made in 2004 and 2022 to minister-chaired committees.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)
